dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: If the city still remembers her, we can still reach her.

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Then keep moving. The rails are whispering the way down.

dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: If the city still remembers her, we can still reach her.

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Then keep moving. The rails are whispering the way down.

dialogue.speaker: Tula Echo
dialogue.text: Follow the shrine heat, not the loudest hymn.

dialogue.speaker: Tula Echo
dialogue.text: Follow the shrine heat, not the loudest hymn.

dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: You scout the ledges. I break the locks.

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: And when you miss a step, I keep you off the floor below.

dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: You scout the ledges. I break the locks.

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: And when you miss a step, I keep you off the floor below.

dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: Every strap earns its keep. Nothing rides on me for show.

dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: Every strap earns its keep. Nothing rides on me for show.

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: I do not fly away. I correct the fall.

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: I do not fly away. I correct the fall.

dialogue.speaker: Tula
dialogue.text: They can cage my body. They still cannot catalog my will.

dialogue.speaker: Tula
dialogue.text: They can cage my body. They still cannot catalog my will.

dialogue.speaker: Matra Vey
dialogue.text: Mercy is the final obedience. I will make the city gentle by force.

dialogue.speaker: Matra Vey
dialogue.text: Mercy is the final obedience. I will make the city gentle by force.

dialogue.speaker: Edda
dialogue.text: A shrine is not a throne. It is a promise somebody keeps every day.

overlays: hive amber, smoke brown, linen white, brass green

dialogue.speaker: Edda
dialogue.text: A shrine is not a throne. It is a promise somebody keeps every day.

overlays: hive amber, smoke brown, linen white, brass green

dialogue.speaker: Vilm
dialogue.text: Maps cost extra when the walls start lying.

overlays: oil blue, rust orange, lamp yellow, tar black

dialogue.speaker: Vilm
dialogue.text: Maps cost extra when the walls start lying.

overlays: oil blue, rust orange, lamp yellow, tar black

dialogue.speaker: Halceon
dialogue.text: I know the hymns they used to break us. I know where they skip a beat.

overlays: chalk white, bruise plum, iron grey, votive blue

dialogue.speaker: Halceon
dialogue.text: I know the hymns they used to break us. I know where they skip a beat.

overlays: chalk white, bruise plum, iron grey, votive blue

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Warm lamps, clean ladders, three exits. This is where the city still breathes right.

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Warm lamps, clean ladders, three exits. This is where the city still breathes right.

dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: This was home before it became evidence.

dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: This was home before it became evidence.

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Everything here wants a prayer, a coin, or your nerves.

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Everything here wants a prayer, a coin, or your nerves.

dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: They buried memory under the tracks and wondered why the rails howl.

dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: They buried memory under the tracks and wondered why the rails howl.

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Do not trust the bright water. It glows because it is hungry.

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Do not trust the bright water. It glows because it is hungry.

dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: A house should hold a family. Not a sermon with teeth.

dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: A house should hold a family. Not a sermon with teeth.

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Wind is honest. The speakers are what twist it.

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Wind is honest. The speakers are what twist it.

dialogue.speaker: Matra Vey
dialogue.text: One city, one will, one perfect hush.

dialogue.speaker: Matra Vey
dialogue.text: One city, one will, one perfect hush.

dialogue.speaker: Edda
dialogue.text: Repair first. Blessing comes after the bolts hold.

dialogue.speaker: Edda
dialogue.text: Repair first. Blessing comes after the bolts hold.

dialogue.speaker: Vilm
dialogue.text: Tiny things move districts. That is why everyone kills over them.

dialogue.speaker: Vilm
dialogue.text: Tiny things move districts. That is why everyone kills over them.

dialogue.speaker: Lantern Kin
dialogue.text: We kept the light small so the dark would think we were gone.

dialogue.speaker: Lantern Kin
dialogue.text: We kept the light small so the dark would think we were gone.

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Grab the rail late. Jump early. Trust me in the middle.

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Grab the rail late. Jump early. Trust me in the middle.

dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: Commit to the hit. Survive the answer.

dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: Commit to the hit. Survive the answer.

dialogue.speaker: Tula Echo
dialogue.text: People leave marks in each other long before the city writes them down.

dialogue.speaker: Tula Echo
dialogue.text: People leave marks in each other long before the city writes them down.

dialogue.speaker: Debt Collector
dialogue.text: If the borough cannot pay in coin, it will pay in shrine metal.

overlays: rust gold, debt red, soot black, hive amber

dialogue.text: If the borough cannot pay in coin, it will pay in shrine metal.

dialogue.speaker: Bishop Static
dialogue.text: A louder miracle is still a miracle to those who cannot leave.

overlays: neon cyan, chapel magenta, chrome brass, sermon black

dialogue.speaker: Bishop Static
dialogue.text: A louder miracle is still a miracle to those who cannot leave.

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Listen. The station beast announces every charge like a train that hates us.

overlays: furnace amber, bone ivory, signal red, ash grey

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Listen. The station beast announces every charge like a train that hates us.

overlays: furnace amber, bone ivory, signal red, ash grey

dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: No eyes. No mercy. Just appetite and runoff.

overlays: acid amber, mold green, tar black, wet steel

dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: No eyes. No mercy. Just appetite and runoff.

overlays: acid amber, mold green, tar black, wet steel

dialogue.speaker: Red Mother
dialogue.text: Be still, little lights. I can love you into silence.

overlays: nursery red, ash white, soot black, candle gold

dialogue.speaker: Red Mother
dialogue.text: Be still, little lights. I can love you into silence.

overlays: nursery red, ash white, soot black, candle gold

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Cut the pattern. Do not fight the scream head-on.

overlays: storm white, cobalt blue, rust brass, scream black

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Cut the pattern. Do not fight the scream head-on.

overlays: storm white, cobalt blue, rust brass, scream black

dialogue.speaker: Matra Vey
dialogue.text: I gave the city one throat so it would never disagree again.

overlays: violet lightning, blood ember, shrine ivory, abyss black

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Landmark ahead. Shrine left. Trouble above.

dialogue.speaker: Patoot
dialogue.text: Landmark ahead. Shrine left. Trouble above.

dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: Good. Put the warnings where my hands can find them.

dialogue.speaker: Bango
dialogue.text: Good. Put the warnings where my hands can find them.

dialogue.speaker: Tula
dialogue.text: It is still wounded. That means it is still alive enough to heal.

dialogue.speaker: Tula
